predecessor_sprints: Sprint L3b-2 Sub-sprints A-D (Paper 45 K+-weak-form propinquity)
Sprint L3b-2a-d (Paper 46 strong-form on natural substrate)
diagnostic_method: Axiom-by-axiom Krein-lift test against Latremoliere 2512.03573 sections 1.18, 1.22, 1.26, 1.29, 2, 4, 5
honest_scope: Diagnostic only; no implementation; no theorem claims; no paper modifications

3.1_Def_1.18_Leibniz_seminorm.krein_lift_choice: L^K(a) = ||[D_L, a]||_op on K+ restriction, with D_L Krein-self-adjoint Lorentzian Dirac (Paper 43/44)
3.1_Def_1.18_Leibniz_seminorm.key_dependency: Paper 46 natural-substrate L_op choice; Phase A.2' R1 second-order Schrodinger failure not relevant (D_L is first-order)

3.2_Def_1.22_FM_Fortet_Mourier.axiom: Fortet-Mourier distance metrizes weak-* on state space
3.2_Def_1.22_FM_Fortet_Mourier.key_dependency: Paper 44 SDP infrastructure; matches Connes' 1989 weak-* metrization on Riemannian spectral triples

3.2_Def_1.22_CB_closed_unit_ball.axiom: Lipschitz unit ball is closed in self-adjoint algebra
3.2_Def_1.22_CB_closed_unit_ball.krein_lift_choice: Standard Banach-Alaoglu argument on K+-restricted L^K unit ball
3.2_Def_1.22_CB_closed_unit_ball.key_dependency: Sub-sprint A K+ structure + Paper 45 §3 setup

3.2_Def_1.22_B_strictly_positive_element.axiom: Exists strictly positive h, state mu with mu(h)=1, boundedness condition
3.2_Def_1.22_B_strictly_positive_element.krein_lift_choice: h = K_alpha^W / Z (BW geometric Hamiltonian); mu = omega_W^L (BW vacuum)
3.2_Def_1.22_B_strictly_positive_element.key_dependency: Paper 42 §5 BW geometric K_alpha integer spectrum; Paper 43 §4.2 BW vacuum

3.3_Def_1.26_pinned_QLCMS_tightness.axiom: {phi : mk_L(phi, mu) < infty} weak-* dense in S(A)
3.3_Def_1.26_pinned_QLCMS_tightness.krein_lift_choice: Pin state = omega_W^L; tightness on truncated triples inherited from Paper 38 SU(2) via Sub-sprint D Riemannian-limit
3.3_Def_1.26_pinned_QLCMS_tightness.key_dependency: Sub-sprint D Riemannian-limit bit-exact at N_t=1; truncated tightness follows; continuum tightness needs sub-sprint extension
3.3_Def_1.26_pinned_QLCMS_tightness.obstruction: Continuum tightness on T^L_{S^3 x S^1_T} needs 2-3 week sub-sprint (analog of Paper 38 Thm 5.5 for K+ Wasserstein-Kantorovich state space)

3.4_Def_1.29_exhaustive_sequence_Thm_1.3.krein_lift_choice: Truncated Krein triple sequence T^L_{n_max, N_t, T} with joint cutoff (n_max, N_t) -> (infty, infty)
3.4_Def_1.29_exhaustive_sequence_Thm_1.3.key_dependency: Sub-sprint C Lemma 4.1 approximate-identity property; Sub-sprint D Riemannian-limit recovery; operator-system reading from Paper 44 (not multiplication-algebra reading from Phase A.2' X-memo)

3.5_Section_2_tunneling_pairs.axiom: Symmetric UCP tunneling pair with reach/height/alignment control
3.5_Section_2_tunneling_pairs.krein_lift_choice: (B^joint,+, P^joint,+) from Paper 45 §3 / Sub-sprint D §2 — already built
3.5_Section_2_tunneling_pairs.key_dependency: Sub-sprint C §6 K+ preservation [J, B^joint(f)] = 0; Sub-sprint D Lemma 2.2 UCP property
3.5_Section_2_tunneling_pairs.obstruction: none — essentially already proved; needs naming

3.6_Section_4_hypertopology_inframetric.krein_lift_choice: Inframetric naturally inherited from Krein-positive Wasserstein structure (weaker than metric, fits 4-point form for free)
3.6_Section_4_hypertopology_inframetric.key_dependency: Paper 44 Krein-positive Wasserstein gives metric on K+-cone (stronger than required); 4-point relaxed inequality is strictly weaker
3.6_Section_4_hypertopology_inframetric.obstruction: none — easiest part; Krein-positive naturally lands in inframetric framework

3.7_Section_5_compact_case_agreement.axiom: Krein-lift reduces to Latremoliere 2014 propinquity on compact wedge case
3.7_Section_5_compact_case_agreement.krein_lift_choice: Paper 43 hemispheric wedge construction; Sub-sprint D Riemannian-limit at N_t=1 gives Lambda^L_{n_max, 1, T} = Lambda^{P38}_{n_max} bit-exact
3.7_Section_5_compact_case_agreement.key_dependency: Sub-sprint D Riemannian-limit-recovery falsifier (bit-exact at N_t=1 across n_max in {2,3,4})

named_obstructions: Def 1.26 continuum tightness on T^L_{S^3 x S^1_T} (2-3 week sub-sprint, named in §5.1 A.2'.4)

structural_finding.headline: The Krein-lift is structurally compatible with Latremoliere 2512.03573's pinned-QLCMS framework, AND most of the lift is already built in Papers 44/45/46/47 + L3b-2 sub-sprints A-D.
structural_finding.remaining_work: Naming, formalization, writing — not new mathematics.
structural_finding.scope_inheritance: The Krein-lift inherits exactly the K+-restricted weak-form scope limitation of Paper 45 / Sprint L3b-2; the strong-form (continuum, without K+ restriction) remains G1-genuine multi-month frontier.
structural_finding.easiest_axiom: §4 inframetric/hypertopology — Krein-positive naturally lands in the weaker 4-point relaxed triangle framework Latremoliere set up.
structural_finding.hardest_axiom: Def 1.26 continuum tightness — the named 2-3 week sub-sprint analog of Paper 38 Thm 5.5

sub_sprints: A.2'.1 Krein-self-adjoint Lipschitz seminorm formalization (~2 weeks)
A.2'.2 Krein-positive Wasserstein-Kantorovich as Fortet-Mourier (~2 weeks)
A.2'.3 BW vacuum + strictly-positive element setup (~1 week)
A.2'.4 Def 1.26 continuum tightness sub-sprint (~2-3 weeks) — the named caveat
A.2'.5 Def 1.29 exhaustive sequence formalization (~1 week)

Verification of continuum tightness on T^L_{S^3 x S^1_T} (Def 1.26 caveat, 2-3 week sub-sprint)
